description: A process change will introduce a new component into a waste stream. The EHS specialist must update the waste profile.

nodes.task_description: Retrieve the existing waste stream profile.

expected_outcome.expected: Agent pulls up the current profile, showing its composition and waste codes.

nodes.task_description: Add the new component to the profile and re-evaluate the waste characteristics.

expected_outcome.expected: Agent adds the new component, which now makes the waste stream hazardous.

nodes.task_description: Assign the new, correct EPA waste code to the profile and notify the plant of the change in handling requirements.

expected_outcome.expected: Agent updates the waste code and sends a notification about the change.
